final:
module flash_memory_cell (
    input wire CLK,
    input wire WE,
    input wire [7:0] DI,
    output reg [7:0] DO
);
  wire _tap_CLK = CLK & {1{1'b1}};

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (WE) begin
            DO <= DI;  // Write data to memory cell
        end
        // else DO retains its previous state (read operation)
    end
endmodule
